headings: IV. Insurance Policy Deductibles and Self-Insured Retentions.
text: - d. Builder's Risk Deductible Contribution. In the event of physical loss or damage, and/or any other loss or damage as provided for in the Builder's Risk Policy, which requires  Owner  to  satisfy  all  or  any  portion  of  the  deductibles  or  self-insured retentions set forth in the Builder's Risk Policy (the 'Builder's Risk Deductible') and which arises out of or is in any way connected with the Work, the Owner may, in its sole discreti on, seek contribution(s) towards such Builder's Risk Deductible (the  'Builder's  Risk  Deductible  Contribution')  from  any  'Involved  Party,'  in  a total amount not to exceed $50,000.00 per occurrence.
